common.c(3) Library Functions Manual common.c(3)

NAME

common.c - 🔧 Core utilities: memory management, safe macros, and cross-platform helpers

SYNOPSIS

Functions


void shutdown_register_callback (shutdown_check_fn callback)
Register application's shutdown check function. bool shutdown_is_requested (void)
Check if shutdown has been requested. __attribute__ ((constructor))
Register fork handlers for common module. asciichat_error_t asciichat_shared_init (const char *log_file, bool is_client)
Initialize common subsystems shared by client and server. void asciichat_shared_destroy (void)
Clean up all shared library subsystems.

Variables


int g_argc = 0
Global argc for early argument inspection (e.g., --color flag detection) Set by main() for access from lib/platform/terminal.c during early execution. char ** g_argv = NULL
Global argv for early argument inspection (e.g., --color flag detection) Set by main() for access from lib/platform/terminal.c during early execution. bool g_color_flag_passed = false
Was --color explicitly passed in command-line arguments? Set by options_init() before RCU is initialized, used by terminal_should_color_output(). bool g_color_flag_value = false
Value of --color flag (true if --color was in argv) Set by options_init() before RCU is initialized, used by terminal_should_color_output().
